input: Analyze this 200-line Python function called process_order that handles validation, pricing, tax calculation, discount application, inventory check, payment processing, and email notification all in one function with 8 levels of nesting and cyclomatic complexity of 34.

Plan a refactoring for a Django app where changing the pricing model requires modifying 12 different files across 4 modules. Adding a new product type requires changes in the Product model, the serializer, the admin panel, the API view, the template, and the test file.

Sequence the refactoring of a legacy payment module (2000 lines, no tests) that needs to be broken into separate validation, charging, and receipt modules. The new modules need to maintain backward compatibility with 15 existing callers.
Generate before/after examples for replacing a nested switch statement (switch on user type, then switch on action type, 24 cases total) with a polymorphic design using the Strategy pattern.

Verify behavioral equivalence after refactoring a caching layer that was extracted from inline code in 6 different API endpoints into a shared CacheService class. The original code had subtle differences in TTL and key generation between endpoints.
